privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Robert Baker. DOB: 1958-05-14. File to upload: /home/ga/Documents/Consult_Report.pdf. Expected label/description must contain the words 'cardiology' and 'consult' (e.g., 'Cardiology Consult'). System: NOSH ChartingSystem.
